goals.title: Same passphrase and same persisted vault file unlock the same encrypt...
goals.objective: Same passphrase and same persisted vault file unlock the same encrypted app-state envelope across a fresh process/app instance.
goals.evidence: Added production_passphrase_vault_app_db_survives_fresh_instance_with_same_password to prove same passphrase and same persisted vault file unlock the same encrypted app-state envelope across a fresh instance.

goals.title: If an encrypted app-state envelope exists but the selected keychain/v...
goals.objective: If an encrypted app-state envelope exists but the selected keychain/vault has no wrapping key, saving fails closed instead of creating a replacement wrapping key.
goals.evidence: Changed load_or_create_wrapping_key so existing encrypted app-state plus Ok(None) from keychain returns KeychainMissing instead of creating a replacement wrapping key.

goals.title: Wrong passphrase or missing vault material preserves the existing enc...
goals.objective: Wrong passphrase or missing vault material preserves the existing encrypted app-state bytes.
goals.evidence: Added wrong-password and missing-vault assertions preserving existing encrypted app-state/vault bytes.

goals.title: Regression coverage includes an isolated file/vault durability test a...
goals.objective: Regression coverage includes an isolated file/vault durability test and package-smoke planning for `.deb` reinstall.
goals.evidence: Added isolated production-storage file/vault tests and package-smoke dry-run coverage for .deb reinstall plan.

goals.title: Tighten `EncryptedAppDb::load_or_create_wrapping_key` so existing enc...
goals.objective: Tighten `EncryptedAppDb::load_or_create_wrapping_key` so existing encrypted app-state files treat `Ok(None)` from the keychain as `KeychainMissing` rather than generating a new wrapping key.
goals.evidence: Implemented EncryptedAppDb missing-key fail-closed behavior for existing encrypted app-state files.

goals.title: Add production-storage tests proving passphrase-vault encrypted app-s...
goals.objective: Add production-storage tests proving passphrase-vault encrypted app-state survives a fresh keychain instance with the same password and rejects wrong password/missing vault without modifying files.
goals.evidence: Added production-storage tests for same-password fresh instance durability and missing-vault no-overwrite behavior.

goals.title: Missing vault/keyring entry with existing encrypted app-state: return...
goals.objective: Missing vault/keyring entry with existing encrypted app-state: return `KeychainMissing`; do not generate a new wrapping key.
goals.evidence: Existing encrypted app-state now returns KeychainMissing when the selected keychain/vault has no wrapping key; missing-vault test asserts no replacement vault file is created.

goals.title: Wrong password: AES-GCM decrypt failure propagates; do not write the...
goals.objective: Wrong password: AES-GCM decrypt failure propagates; do not write the app-state file or vault file.
goals.evidence: Wrong passphrase path propagates AES-GCM decrypt failure and test asserts app-state and vault bytes remain unchanged.

goals.title: Fresh first run: app-state file is absent, so creating the initial wr...
goals.objective: Fresh first run: app-state file is absent, so creating the initial wrapping key remains allowed.
goals.evidence: Fresh first-run behavior remains unchanged: only absent app-state files may create a new wrapping key.
